---
title: &TITLE Evelia Lorena Coss Navarrete
last: Coss
first: Evelia
people_group: postdoc
email: "anyanc@uw.edu"
education:
  - Ph.D. Chemistry | University of Washington 
subtitle: Graduate Student
description: ""
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:anyanc@uw.edu
---

<hr>

::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

<br>
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
